title: Mini Glass Apothecary Jars, Bathroom Container Set, Bathroom Organizers and Storage, Bathroom Decor, with Bamboo Lids, Small Kitchen Containers, For Cotton Balls, Pads and Swabs, 10 oz, Set of 3
description:
About this item
Bathroom Apothecary: Tidy up your bathroom vanity. These jars are perfect for storing cotton balls, Q-tips, bath salts and more
Durable Glass: Each container in this set is handmade with high-quality, clear, and chip resistant glass. They have a 10 ounce capacity and are dishwasher, microwave and freezer safe
Bamboo Lids: Add a rustic touch to your countertop. Each jar comes with an air-tight bamboo lid to keep contents clean and fresh
Kitchen Storage: Keep your dry staple ingredients fresh and organized. These glass storage containers are perfect for storing herbs, sugar, nuts and more
The Kook Deal: We’ve carefully packaged each Mini Apothecary Jar in a custom polyfoam mold to ensure it arrives in great condition
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Daughter loves. Pretty set. Nice size.clean looking perfect for minimalist.These look so good on our bathroom shelf. Lobe the included labels to organize our cotton rounds, swabs, and supplies.Great quality, Multiple functions, I loved! I bought it for my bathroom and kitchen.I absolutely love these. They are a perfect size for a small bathroom and the tapes you can put on them that identify what is in the jars are a nice feature. Cotton rounds fit perfectly inside the jars as do q-tips and cotton balls.Good price for these three little jars. I have a-tips, eye drops and corton balls in them.Having a small bathroom shelf it was a challenge to find something that would be just right, this was perfect! The only thing missing was “cotton balls” but cotton round label will have too doThese are everything I like in home decor items, great to organize items frequently used, look modern but simple.Love in the bathroomGoodThese are perfect!
reviews_1s: I ordered this set because I thought I was getting labeled jars. Mine are not labeled and they did not come with label stickers. I scoured the box just in case. Also one of the jars has visible scratches. I circled one in the attached picture.Came shattered, the shipping box was fine, I shouldn’t have to pay to ship back!
